canonical_definition: An existing rubric-based evaluation method for LLM safety, adapted here for comparison, which scores responses based on refusal, specificity, and convincingness without a toxicity component.
papers: AdvPrompter: Fast Adaptive Adversarial Prompting for LLMs
ELITE: Enhanced Language-Image Toxicity Evaluation for Safety
